docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,473.77 FILED BY ABBAS, HINA AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, GENESIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED DEC-10-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, GENESIS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABBAS, HINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, GENESIS $4,473.77 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,523.77 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABBAS, HINA AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, GENESIS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-16-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEBRUARY-16-2016 BY HON. DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF APPEARS. THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT APPEAR. THE MATTER IS HEARD BY THE COURT AND IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK M.L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 506).
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $317.28 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, GENESIS
